document_id: 3.5 NC ESG Third Party Verification of Client's Income 2021.v1.pdf

findings.description: Top contact fields are reflowed from a two-column arrangement into a more linear layout.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the 'Please return this form to' area places Name & Title/Address/Email on the left and Phone/Fax on the right. In the HTML, Phone and Fax are pulled inline with the left-side fields rather than maintained as a distinct right-side block.

findings.description: Checkbox option formatting in the benefit income section is changed to a bulleted list with inline square symbols.
findings.evidence: The PDF presents the 'CHECK ONE' options in multiple aligned columns with checkbox symbols. The HTML renders them as a vertical bulleted list, with checkbox glyphs appearing inline before each item.
